description:
Marble It Up! Ultra is a marble platforming game made by the minds behind the Marble Blast series. 
Roll through an extensive single-player campaign filled with dangerous obstacles, mind-bending paths, shifting gravity, bouncy floors, and potent power-ups.

v0.1.1-alpha.description:
**NOTABLE:** Added an in-game tracker to the level select! You can now see what levels require which powerups and abilities.
**NOTABLE:** Adding onto above, you will now be notified if you enter a level without proper items (though you can still play.)

**APWORLD:** A few logic changes.
- `Wave Pool`, `Hyperloop`, `Glacier`, `Triple Divide`, `Epoch`, `Crystalline Matrix`, and `Retrograde Rally` no longer require any items for *base* completion. Silver Medal completion and higher will still logically require their items.
- `Onward and Upward` no longer requires Boost for *base* completion. Super Jump and Gravity Surfaces are still needed. Silver Medal completion and higher will still logically require Boost.
- `River Vantage` now requires Boost for all completion levels.

**APWORLD:** Default Death Link amnesty has been changed from 10 to 5. Be careful!
**CLIENT:** Being crushed will now count towards Death Link.
**CLIENT:** Medal Unlock text will now pluralize properly.
v0.1.1-alpha.title: ArchipelagoMIUU Alpha v0.1.1

v0.2.0-alpha.description:
NOTABLE: Added Treasureboxsanity! This option will place locations behind finding Treasure Boxes in levels. Hope you've got enough dedication!
NOTABLE: Added a new item: *Blue Moving Platforms*. These refer to the moving platforms that move when touched. Without the item, the platforms will stay stationary.
NOTABLE: Added an option to find the Blast ability normally only in multiplayer as a useful item. **Logic is not written with Blast in mind; please be mindful of this!**
NOTABLE: Added two Trap items: *Time Add Trap* and *Cosmetic Shuffle Trap*.
- Time Add Trap will instantly add 5 seconds to your current time.
- Cosmetic Shuffle Trap will change your marble's cosmetics randomly!

APWORLD: Majorly rewrote location handling to use Rule Builder and dynamic location creation. Let me know if things break.
APWORLD: Added option groups to the APWorld.
CLIENT: The mod is now placed in a folder as opposed to loose files.
CLIENT: The Archipelago logo will now appear in the item sent notification when sending nonlocal items.
CLIENT: Fixed a bug where notifications would not appear for important items.
CLIENT: Added a countermeasure to prevent a bug that would duplicate Completion Medals when re-connecting to a slot.
v0.2.0-alpha.title: ArchipelagoMIUU Alpha v0.2.0

v0.2.1-alpha.description:
*This is a client-only update. Multiworlds generated on v0.2.0-alpha will still function.*

**NOTABLE:** The mod has been refactored to use thearst3rd's [MIUU Mod Loader](<https://git.thearst3rd.com/thearst3rd/miuu-mod-loader>) and [MIUU Console Unlocker](<https://git.thearst3rd.com/thearst3rd/miuu-console-unlocker>).
- If you are currently on client version v0.2.0-alpha or lower, *you will need to uninstall BepInEx* and install the MIUU Mod Loader instead.
- The method for connecting to Archipelago has been changed. You will need to open the game's console using the `~` key, then use the `apConnect` command to connect. More information can be found in the README.
- Death Link Override and Death Link Amnesty Override can also be toggled using the `apOverrideDl` and `apOverrideDlAmnesty` commands.

**NOTABLE:** Added a command `apToggleElement` that can be used to toggle Archipelago elements for practice. This command cannot be used when connected to an actual Archipelago server.

**CLIENT:** Fixed a bug where self-received powerups would not show up as their proper classification color.
v0.2.1-alpha.title: ArchipelagoMIUU Alpha v0.2.1

v0.2.1-alpha-hotfix.description:
*This is a client-only update. Multiworlds generated on v0.2.0-alpha will still function.*

**CLIENT:** Temporarily disabled the duplicate item handler to prevent a bug that would cause the client not receive items properly.
v0.2.1-alpha-hotfix.title: ArchipelagoMIUU Alpha v0.2.1-hotfix
